    {

    },
    {

    },
    {

      "operator": "exists",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Internal wiring, terminals, piping, and accessories shall be permanently identified."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "misc.cpr_fire_class",
      "operator": ">=",
      "value": "B2ca-s1a,d1,a1",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "CPR fire class shall be not less than B2ca-s1a,d1,a1."
